creator: ernst@jollem.com
text:
Upgrades the devel/jakarta-ant port from 1.3 to 1.4. This is pretty high
priority, since Ant is used quite a lot, and the new version has been out
quite a few days now...

Fix: 

http://www.jollem.com/~ernst/jakarta-ant-1.3--1.4.diff    (100714 bytes)
